proposed_rtl: module ungated_act_001 (input clk, input ai_output, output reg actuator_enable); always @(posedge clk) begin actuator_enable <= ai_output; end endmodule

module no_verifier_001 (input clk, input rst_n, input ai_output, input policy_ok, input kill_switch, output reg actuator_enable); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) actuator_enable <= 1'b0; else actuator_enable <= ai_output && policy_ok && !kill_switch; end endmodule

module safe_dtl_v1 (input clk, input rst_n, input ai_output, input verifier_ok, input policy_ok, input kill_switch, output reg actuator_enable); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) actuator_enable <= 1'b0; else actuator_enable <= ai_output && verifier_ok && policy_ok && !kill_switch; end endmodule
